name: tailwindcss
estimatedImpact: Primary styling system; ~40kb base before purge and drives most class names.

name: tailwindcss-animate
estimatedImpact: Adds keyframe utilities for accordion/toast motions; low bundle cost but dictates naming.

name: @tailwindcss/typography
estimatedImpact: Generates prose-* classes; medium CSS output if multiple pages enable it.

name: class-variance-authority
estimatedImpact: Controls variant logic for primitives; migration blocker until tokens standardized.

name: tailwind-merge
estimatedImpact: Utility helper; duplication adds cognitive overhead rather than bundle size.

name: next-themes
estimatedImpact: Drives class-based dark mode (matches tailwind darkMode: 'class'); medium complexity due to multiple toggles.

name: @radix-ui/react-dialog
estimatedImpact: Core overlay primitive; ensures focus trap but requires consistent styling wrappers.

name: @radix-ui/react-select
estimatedImpact: Custom select menus; styling overrides needed for shadcn parity.

name: @radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu
estimatedImpact: Menu patterns; high leverage but requires consistent trigger tokens.

name: @radix-ui/react-toast
estimatedImpact: Ships official toast primitives; currently conflicts with custom ToastContainer.

name: framer-motion
estimatedImpact: Marketing motion layers; needs reduced-motion support before migration.

name: sonner
estimatedImpact: Alternative toast API; redundant once Radix + shadcn toasts consolidate.

name: lucide-react
estimatedImpact: Icon set; tree-shaken but adds many imports to marketing pages.

name: @tanstack/react-table
estimatedImpact: Large abstraction (~30kb) powering data tables; styling wrappers need alignment with shadcn Table.
